form.formComment: Last start 8th of 15 at Chantilly All Weather on March 23 over 1900m, 5 len behind Zeloro carrying 55kg at $36. The race before that ran last of 16 at Chantilly All Weather on March 3 over 1900m, 13 len behind Memphis Tennessee carrying 55kg at $23. Makes appeal.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 40-day let-up. Last start won by 0.5 len at Chantilly All Weather February 27 over 1900m defeating Rival Order carrying 55.5kg at $4.30. The start before that 4th of 11 at Deauville All Weather on February 7 over 1900m, 5.5 len behind Lavendin carrying 54.5kg at $11. Last-start winner worth including.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a nose at Le Mans March 20 over 1950m on a soft track defeating Meautis carrying 54.5kg at $7. The race before that 9th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on February 27 over 1600m, 5 len behind Bin Zarak with 57.5kg at $9.40. Can get the job done again.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Finished off last campaign ran last in a small field at Bellewstown on October 2 over 2514m, slow going 21 len behind Snapretend carrying 64.5kg at $2.60. Won previous preparation first up favourite; won by 2.75 len at Leopardstown April 9 over 2011m defeating Ard Na Mara carrying 63kg at $8. Rates well so watch for a market push.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 15 at Le Mans on March 20 over 1950m, slow going 3 len behind Alkidan carrying 56kg at $8. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Dax on May 19 over 1400m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Nordeste with 60kg at $4.30. Shaping up nicely and is worth including.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last start ran last of 7 at Compiegne on March 27 over 2400m, on a slow track; 33 len behind Acotango carrying 56kg at $26. form.formComment: Resuming after a ten months break. Finished off last preparation second last in a small field at Salon-de-Provence June 9 over 2000m, 2.75 len behind Dioptase with 57.5kg at $4.70. At his first start won by 0.5 len Toulouse February 24 2025 over 1600m slow track defeating Kai Lung with 56kg at $14. Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Second-up. form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since she finished last of 11 at this track August 23 over 1400m, 21 len behind Breckenbrough carrying 56.5kg at $93. On debut 11th of 13 at Clairefontaine August 8 over 1600m, 13 len behind Anakova carrying 54.5kg at $123. Prefer others.
